title: chionanthus boutonii
intro: Chionanthus boutonii, also known as the Chinese fringe tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and Southeast Asia, characterized by its showy white flowers and distinctive fringe-like stamens. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Chionanthus boutonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Chionanthus boutonii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
